title: Projektleiter/in Implementierung (m/w/d) im Bereich Payroll - Hybrid
required_skills: IT affinity and payroll/HR systems knowledge
Project management experience with structured approach
Experience with payroll/billing systems (PAISY Advanced, LOGA, edlohn)
Independent, goal-oriented, and reliable work style
bonus_skills: Experience with payroll parameterization (Lohn- und Zeitarten)
matched_skills: Project management experience — HSBC PMO (6 workstreams, USD 8M budget governance) and Hapag-Lloyd (sprint coordination)
MS Office proficiency — Excel and MS Office used extensively across all roles
Stakeholder management and client orientation — C-suite reporting at HSBC, vendor management at IPC Marketing
Structured and goal-oriented work style — multi-workstream governance with milestone tracking
Cross-functional coordination — managing 6 workstreams across departments at HSBC
Risk management — risk escalation and burn-rate tracking at HSBC
missing_skills: Payroll/HR system expertise (PAISY, LOGA, edlohn or equivalent)
German language at operational implementation level (B1 only)
Payroll parameterization and system configuration skills
HR compliance and labor law knowledge for payroll context
core_responsibilities: Conduct kick-off meetings and coordinate project appointments (remote) and regular client calls
Analyze client requirements and create customized payroll concept
Lead and organize project management tasks, including coordination of all project stakeholders
Control actual vs. planned comparison of all project milestones
Conduct training and onboarding sessions for clients on individual modules
Support go-live and accompany clients through live operation
Support sales team for client projects and conduct internal sales team training
recommended_emphasis: HSBC PMO governance (USD 8M, 6 workstreams) as evidence of complex multi-stakeholder project leadership
Milestone tracking and burn-rate dashboard management as project controlling capability
Hapag-Lloyd client-facing sprint coordination as implementation delivery context
IPC Marketing vendor/partner management as client relationship management evidence
summary: Scoring 32.0, this is a weak match. ADP's payroll implementation lead role requires specific payroll/HR system knowledge (PAISY, LOGA) and operational German language fluency that Boru lacks. The project management, stakeholder coordination, and client management strengths are genuinely transferable, but the payroll domain expertise and German proficiency requirements represent significant gaps. Application may be considered only as a stretch with a strong cover letter emphasizing the PM track record and willingness to upskill in payroll domain knowledge.
